data.title: Add structural unit test for Step 10a story validation failure detection branching
data.description: Story 758c-6993 DD4 requires structural Python test for the Step 10a validation failure branching in sprint SKILL.md (lines 1257-1275). The test should assert: (1) the validation failure branching section exists in SKILL.md, (2) REPLAN_TRIGGER: validation command is present, (3) implementation-plan re-invocation is specified, (4) the story is not closed while the done definition is failing. Pattern: tests/skills/test_sprint_completion_verifier_enforcement.py. File Impact: tests/skills/test_sprint_validation_failure_routing.py (create), plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md (read-only).
